recommended.song_name: Theres Gotta Be More To Life

content:
Heartbeat Song by Kelly Clarkson
Album: Piece By Piece
2015


Standard Tuning
Capo on the 6th fret

Chords:
C:      x32010
Em:     x22000
Am:     x02210
F:      x33211 or 133211
G:      320003 or 320033


[Intro]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
This is my heartbeat song and I'm gonna play it[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]
Been so long I forgot how to turn it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Up up up up all night long[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Oh up up all night long[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Em[/ch]
You, where the hell did you come from[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]Am[/ch]
You're a different different kind of fun[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]F[/ch]
And I'm so used to feeling numb[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                                    [ch]Em[/ch]
Now, I've got pins and needles on my tongue[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Anticipating what's to come[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]F[/ch]
Like a finger on a loaded gun[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I can feel it rising[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]
Temperature inside me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Haven't felt it for a lifetime[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
This is my heartbeat song and I'm gonna play it[/tab]

This is my heartbeat song and I'm gonna play it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Turned it on, but I know you can take it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Up, up, up, up all night long[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Oh up up all night long (all night long)[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
I, I wasn't even gonna go out[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
But I never would have had a doubt[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]F[/ch]
If I'd have known where I'd be now[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Still my kiss on your lips[/tab]

[Bridge]

Until tonight I only dreamed about you[/tab]

I can't believe I ever breathed without you[/tab]

Baby, you make me feel alive and brand new[/tab]

Bring it one more time, one more time
